title: tillandsia elongata var. elongata
intro: Tillandsia elongata var. elongata is a species of air plant, a type of epiphyte that obtains moisture and nutrients from the air rather than through a root system, and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tillandsia elongata var. elongata are said to include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and crushing the leaves to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
